ItacPersonItem.Notes: Ferrante Carafa was the President of the Ardenti Academy in Naples. For more information on Ferrante Carafa see Raffaele Ajello, Una società anomala, Naples, 1996 (British Library shelfmark:Ya.2000.a.35175)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
